content_en: wasallam) said When one of you makes wudoo and makes it well, then goes out to the mosque - having no purpose except Prayer - then his left foot continues to wipe away his evil deeds and his right foot continually writes for him good deeds until he enters the mosque. And if the people knew what there was in the night prayer and Subh prayers - then they would come to them even if they had to crawl. [Reported by at-Tabraanee in 'al-Mu'jam ulKabeer'. And Ash-Shaikh al-Albaanee declares it to be sahih (As-Saheehah, no.454). And its meaning is reported by al-Bukhaaree and Muslim from the narration of Abu Hurairah].
title_id: Hadis 12: Ibnu Umar tentang Langkah Menuju Masjid setelah Wudu
content_id: Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu anhuma) berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Apabila salah seorang dari kalian berwudu dan menyempurnakan wudunya, kemudian keluar menuju masjid dengan tidak ada tujuan selain salat, maka kaki kirinya terus menghapus kejelekan-kejelekannya dan kaki kanannya terus mencatat kebaikan-kebaikan baginya hingga ia masuk masjid. Seandainya manusia mengetahui apa yang ada pada salat malam dan salat Subuh, niscaya mereka mendatanginya meskipun harus merangkak. [Diriwayatkan oleh At-Thabrani dalam Al-Mujam al-Kabir. Syaikh Al-Albani menyatakannya sahih (As-Sahihah, no. 454). Maknanya juga diriwayatkan oleh Al-Bukhari dan Muslim dari riwayat Abu Hurairah].
